title: Square-Tooth Generator Design Rule Constraint (DRC) Matrix
description: Parametric layout constraints enforcing 16-state logic guard rings by application medium.

hydro.description: High static torque ripples require robust shielding vectors and heavy copper tracking.

wind.description: Optimized for lightning strike mitigation paths and high-frequency aerodynamic harmonic fields.

combustion_fuel.description: Maximizes suppression profiles against extreme spark plug ignition noise and high structural vibrations.
